name: UniPharma Co., Ltd.
summary: UniPharma Co., Ltd. engages in the brand drug development activities. The company offers adhesion reduction, neurology, cardiovascular, and anesthesia solutions; and antidotes, as well as medical devices and in vitro-diagnostic products. It also develops bio-markers for the diagnosis of neurological disease; and operates a laboratory for neurological bio-markers. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
